movie.title: The Chaser (2008) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Korean] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Joong-ho is a dirty detective turned pimp in financial trouble as several of his girls have recently disappeared without clearing their debts. While trying to track them down, he finds a clue that the vanished girls were all called up by the same client whom one of his girls is meeting with right now.
